title: Embed Everything Not Working
excerpt: I’m using embed everything for my workflows on Monday. It works with every type of link except for google docs. No matter the sharing permissions or google doc, I continue to get the “sorry, the file you requested does n…

posts.author: bri.d43 (Brianna)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’m using embed everything for my workflows on Monday. It works with every type of link except for google docs. No matter the sharing permissions or google doc, I continue to get the “sorry, the file you requested does not exist” message.

Screenshot 2024-02-15 at 11.12.57 PM1382×982 50.9 KB

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Brianna,

I am afraid this behaviour is currently expected - sorry for the setback! If you’d like to embed a google doc, you can do so using this widget, available by navigating to the add widget option.

image (153)1019×368 38.7 KB

posts.author: Nachliel (Nachliel from Easyapps)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @bri.d43

Nachliel from Easyapps here

Our monday app Universal Embedder allows you to embed public URLs in your monday Workspaces, Dashboards, Boards, and items without limiting you to a specific product (i.e., an app for Documents and an app for Sheets, etc).

You can contact us at support@easyappshq.com with any questions.

In addition to that, we provide free training sessions.

Here is an example of embedding a PDF hosted in Google Drive in a Dashboard:

Nachliel

posts.author: julief (Julie F)
posts.cookedHtml: Hello Bianca. We too are having this issue. But the widget you suggested is a paid integration, correct? Is there no free way to embed a google doc? If no why not?
